step_results.name: preflight_api_key
step_results.note: BLOCKER: Neither TURINGOS_SILICONFLOW_API_KEY nor SILICONFLOW_API_KEY is set in shell env. Workspace tmp/phase7_active/turingos.toml configures api_key_env=SILICONFLOW_API_KEY for both meta and blackbox roles; turingos binary calls std::env::var("SILICONFLOW_API_KEY") via require_api_key() at siliconflow_client.rs:240, which will return Err(MissingApiKey) and abort all 3 LLM call sites (cmd_spec.rs:308 driven loop, cmd_spec.rs:1330 synthesis fallback, cmd_generate.rs:176). Without key, no real SiliconFlow call can succeed -> W9 6-step pipeline cannot proceed.

fail_reasons: preflight: SiliconFlow API key not set in environment. Both TURINGOS_SILICONFLOW_API_KEY (named in charter §'Pre-flight environment checks') and SILICONFLOW_API_KEY (the actual name read by the binary per workspace tmp/phase7_active/turingos.toml and src/bin/turingos/cmd_llm.rs:355-359 read_api_key_env_var) are empty. Charter rule: 'If any pre-flight check fails, write a partial verdict explaining the blocker and STOP — do not attempt the pipeline.' Followed that rule.
notes: API calls made: 0 (zero) — pipeline aborted before any LLM call
(a) export SILICONFLOW_API_KEY=sk-... in this shell, then re-dispatch W9 (preferred — matches workspace config)
(b) export TURINGOS_SILICONFLOW_API_KEY=sk-... AND update workspace config via target/debug/turingos llm config set --workspace tmp/phase7_active --api-key-env TURINGOS_SILICONFLOW_API_KEY
(c) Have W9 receive the key inline via authorized one-shot env injection at dispatch time
